General.Name: Sinopharm Tech Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Sinopharm Tech Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in trading of medical and related products in China. It is involved in the provision of Internet plus solution services, including provision of internet related solution services; and manufacturing and distribution of personal protective equipment, consumables, and other related goods. The company also engages in providing supply chain services, including provision of supply chain management, data analysis, and related services; and trading of related goods, and trading of medial and related products. Sinopharm Tech Holdings Limited was formerly known as China Vanguard You Champion Holdings Limited and changed its name to Sinopharm Tech Holdings Limited in June 2019. The company was founded in 1999 and is based in Central, Hong Kong.
